_comment: Source-of-truth registry for numerical/factual claims that appear in prose docs. sync-stats.sh computes each value from the live repo and replaces the inner text of <!-- stat:NAME --> blocks. Add a new stat here, then annotate any doc that mentions the value, and the cycle of 'change → docs lag' is mechanically broken.

verify-rules-checks.description: Number of [N/M] check sections in dev-rules/verify-rules.sh

preflight-sections.description: Number of '---- 检查 N: ' sections in dev-rules/templates/preflight.sh

rules-count.description: Number of .mdc rule files in dev-rules/rules/

commands-count.description: Number of .md command files in dev-rules/commands/

hard-constraint-rows.description: Number of soft→hard mapping rows in digital-clone-research.md §六.½ table
hard-constraint-rows.compute: awk '/^## 六.½/{flag=1; next} /^## /{flag=0} flag' digital-clone-research.md | grep -cE '^\| [^|-]'  | awk '{print $1-1}'

zwbrain.legacy-subsystems.description: zw-brain: Number of legacy '一体化大数据平台' subsystems (source: docs/integrated-bigdata-platform/README.md, may be .gitignore'd in zw-brain repo so guarded).

zwbrain.mapping-rows-old.description: zw-brain: Number of '旧平台映射' rows in design baseline §八 table.
zwbrain.mapping-rows-old.compute: [ -f docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md ] && awk '/^## 八/{flag=1; next} /^## 九/{flag=0} flag' docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md | grep -cE '^\| K[0-9]+ ' || true

zwbrain.mapping-rows-new.description: zw-brain: Number of '新增' rows in design baseline §八 table.
zwbrain.mapping-rows-new.compute: [ -f docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md ] && awk '/^## 八/{flag=1; next} /^## 九/{flag=0} flag' docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md | grep -cE '^\| N[0-9]+ ' || true

zwbrain.webui-pages-cap.description: zw-brain: WebUI core scenario page count (§7.3 table data rows).
zwbrain.webui-pages-cap.compute: [ -f docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md ] && awk '/^### 7\.3 /{flag=1; next} /^### 7\.4|^## 八/{flag=0} flag' docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md | grep -cE '^\| [^|-]' | awk '{print $1>1?$1-1:0}' || true

zwbrain.preflight-sections.description: zw-brain: Project-local scripts/preflight.sh adds 5 sections (7a/7b/9/10/11) on top of the dev-rules template (counts run_check invocations).
